title: achnatherum stillmanii
intro: Achnatherum stillmanii, also known as Stillman's needlegrass, is a perennial grass species native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems. The health benefits of Achnatherum stillmanii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. Achnatherum stillmanii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
